sql_array: CREATE TABLE hex_area_test (resolution UInt8, area Float64);
UPDATE hex_area_test SET area = h3HexAreaKm2(resolution) WHERE resolution = 10;
SELECT resolution, h3HexAreaKm2(resolution) AS area FROM hex_area_test WHERE resolution BETWEEN 0 AND 15;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hex_area_test WHERE area > h3HexAreaKm2(5);
